label.chooseInvestigator: Choose investigator to decide on returning discard

easyStandard.skull: -X. X is the number of Signs of the Gods the investigators have uncovered.
easyStandard.cultist: Reveal another token. If this token is revealed during an investigation and this skill test fails, increase that location's shroud by 1 for the remainder of the round.
easyStandard.tablet: -2. If you fail, either take 1 damage and 1 horror, or place 1 doom on the current agenda.
easyStandard.elderThing: +2. The black cat points you in the right direction. If this token is revealed during an investigation and you succeed, discover 1 additional clue.

hardExpert.skull: -X. X is 1 more than the number of Signs of the Gods the investigators have uncovered.
hardExpert.cultist: Reveal another token. If this token is revealed during an investigation and this skill test fails, increase that location's shroud by 2 for the remainder of the round.
hardExpert.tablet: -3. If you fail, either take 1 damage and 1 horror, or place 1 doom on the current agenda.
hardExpert.elderThing: +1. The black cat points you in the right direction. If this token is revealed during an investigation and you succeed, discover 1 additional clue.

label.forceIntoTemple: Force your way into the temple.
label.placeNightgaunt: Place Tenebrous Nightgaunt in city location

label.shroudPlus2: Your location gets +2 shroud for this investigation

label.visitOriab: Visit the isle of Oriab to the south. Resolve Oriab Setup in the Campaign Guide.
label.visitForbiddenLands: Visit the Forbidden Lands to the north. Resolve Forbidden Lands Setup in the Campaign Guide.
label.visitTimelessRealm: Visit the kingdom of the Timeless Realm to the east. Resolve Timeless Realm Setup in the Campaign Guide.
